infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Minga uses your location to track your hikes and rides.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Minga records your route while you're moving so we can save distance, elevation and pace.
